---
title: "04b — Sample Articles for LLM Labeling (Antisemitism)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
```

## Pass 1: Load only scores (lightweight)

```{r load_scores}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(parallel)

antisem_dir <- file.path(DATA_PARQUET, "articles_antisem_scored")
antisem_files <- list.files(antisem_dir, pattern = "\\.parquet$", full.names = TRUE)
message("Found ", length(antisem_files), " antisemitism-scored year files")

# PASS 1: Read ONLY score + metadata columns in parallel (no article text!)
N_READERS <- 5L
message("Reading scores with ", N_READERS, " parallel workers...")

cl <- makeCluster(N_READERS)
score_chunks <- parLapplyLB(cl, antisem_files, function(f) {
  library(arrow)
  library(data.table)
  as.data.table(read_parquet(f, col_select = c(
    "article_id", "newspaper_name", "year",
    "n_words", "ocr_quality", "antisem_score"
  )))
})
stopCluster(cl)

dt_scores <- rbindlist(score_chunks, fill = TRUE)
rm(score_chunks); gc()

message("Total articles: ", format(nrow(dt_scores), big.mark = ","))
```

## Filter for quality and length

```{r filter}
dt_eligible <- dt_scores[
  !is.na(ocr_quality) & ocr_quality > 0.65 &
  !is.na(n_words) & n_words >= 50
]
rm(dt_scores); gc()

message("Eligible articles (OCR quality > 0.65, >= 50 words): ",
        format(nrow(dt_eligible), big.mark = ","))
message("  With any antisemitism score > 0: ",
        format(sum(dt_eligible$antisem_score > 0, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ","))
```

## Stratified sample

```{r sample}
set.seed(SEED)

TOTAL_SAMPLE <- 4000L

# Stratify by antisemitism lexicon score
nonzero <- dt_eligible[antisem_score > 0]
zero <- dt_eligible[antisem_score == 0]

message("Nonzero-scoring articles: ", format(nrow(nonzero), big.mark = ","))
message("Zero-scoring articles: ", format(nrow(zero), big.mark = ","))

# Score-based targets: 1000 high, 1000 medium, 2000 zero
q75 <- quantile(nonzero$antisem_score, 0.75)
high <- nonzero[antisem_score >= q75]
medium <- nonzero[antisem_score < q75]

n_high <- min(1000L, nrow(high))
n_medium <- min(1000L, nrow(medium))
n_zero <- TOTAL_SAMPLE - n_high - n_medium

message("\nTarget sample: ", TOTAL_SAMPLE)
message("  High (score >= p75): ", n_high)
message("  Medium (score > 0 & < p75): ", n_medium)
message("  Zero (score = 0): ", n_zero)

# Within each stratum, stratify by era to ensure temporal coverage
era_breaks <- c(-Inf, 1830, 1860, 1900, 1930, Inf)
era_labels <- c("pre1830", "1830_1860", "1860_1900", "1900_1930", "1930_1960")

sample_stratum <- function(stratum_dt, n_target, stratum_name) {
  stratum_dt[, era := cut(year, breaks = era_breaks, labels = era_labels, right = FALSE)]

  era_counts <- stratum_dt[, .N, by = era]
  era_counts[, target := pmax(
    5L,
    as.integer(round(n_target * N / sum(N)))
  )]
  era_counts[, target := pmin(target, N)]
  overshoot <- sum(era_counts$target) - n_target
  if (overshoot > 0) {
    big_eras <- era_counts[order(-target)]
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(big_eras))) {
      trim <- min(overshoot, big_eras$target[i] - 5L)
      if (trim > 0) {
        era_counts[era == big_eras$era[i], target := target - trim]
        overshoot <- overshoot - trim
      }
      if (overshoot <= 0) break
    }
  }

  samples <- list()
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(era_counts))) {
    e <- era_counts$era[i]
    n <- era_counts$target[i]
    pool <- stratum_dt[era == e]
    if (nrow(pool) > 0 && n > 0) {
      samples[[length(samples) + 1]] <- pool[sample(.N, min(n, .N))]
    }
  }

  result <- rbindlist(samples, fill = TRUE)
  result[, stratum := stratum_name]
  message("  ", stratum_name, ": sampled ", nrow(result), " across ",
          length(unique(result$era)), " eras")
  result
}

sample_high <- sample_stratum(high, n_high, "high")
sample_medium <- sample_stratum(medium, n_medium, "medium")
sample_zero <- sample_stratum(zero, n_zero, "zero")

# Combine — these are just IDs + scores, no article text yet
sample_ids <- rbindlist(list(sample_high, sample_medium, sample_zero), fill = TRUE)
rm(dt_eligible, nonzero, zero, high, medium, sample_high, sample_medium, sample_zero); gc()

message("\nSampled ", nrow(sample_ids), " article IDs")
message("\nBy stratum:")
print(sample_ids[, .N, by = stratum])
message("\nBy era:")
print(sample_ids[, .N, by = era][order(era)])
```

## Pass 2: Fetch full text for sampled articles only

```{r fetch_text}
# PASS 2: Read article text ONLY for the 4,000 sampled IDs, in parallel
sample_ids[, src_year := as.character(year)]
years_needed <- unique(sample_ids$src_year)
message("Fetching article text from ", length(years_needed), " year files with ",
        N_READERS, " parallel workers...")

# Build lookup: which article_ids per year
ids_by_year <- split(sample_ids$article_id, sample_ids$src_year)

cl <- makeCluster(N_READERS)
text_list <- parLapplyLB(cl, years_needed, function(yr, antisem_dir, ids_by_year) {
  library(arrow)
  library(data.table)
  f <- file.path(antisem_dir, paste0("antisem_scored_", yr, ".parquet"))
  if (!file.exists(f)) return(NULL)
  ids_wanted <- ids_by_year[[yr]]
  dt <- as.data.table(read_parquet(f, col_select = c("article_id", "article")))
  dt[article_id %in% ids_wanted]
}, antisem_dir = antisem_dir, ids_by_year = ids_by_year)
stopCluster(cl)

dt_text <- rbindlist(text_list, fill = TRUE)
rm(text_list); gc()

message("Fetched text for ", nrow(dt_text), " articles")

# Merge text back into sample
sample_4k <- merge(sample_ids, dt_text, by = "article_id", all.x = TRUE)
sample_4k[, src_year := NULL]
rm(sample_ids, dt_text); gc()

# Verify we got text for all
n_missing <- sum(is.na(sample_4k$article) | nchar(sample_4k$article) < 100)
message("Articles with missing/short text: ", n_missing)

message("\nFinal sample: ", nrow(sample_4k), " articles")
message("\nBy decade:")
print(sample_4k[, .N, by = .(decade = floor(year / 10) * 10)][order(decade)])
```

## Save sample

```{r save}
outpath <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "antisem_labeling_sample.parquet")
write_parquet(sample_4k, outpath)
message("Saved labeling sample: ", outpath)

csv_path <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "antisem_labeling_sample.csv")
write.csv(sample_4k[, .(article_id, newspaper_name, year, stratum, era,
                          antisem_score, n_words,
                          article_preview = substr(article, 1, 200))],
          csv_path, row.names = FALSE)
message("Saved CSV preview: ", csv_path)
```
